prompt: The code counts unique words incorrectly — duplicates are not filtered. What is the bug?
choices: All words are added including duplicates; to count unique words use a Set or check contains() before adding
The for-each loop should use an index-based loop
unique.size() returns the wrong value for String lists
explanation: Adding all words to a List keeps duplicates — unique has all 4 elements. Fix option 1: use Set<String> unique = new HashSet<>(words); — HashSet automatically deduplicates. Fix option 2: check if (!unique.contains(w)) unique.add(w); before adding.
